title: Fundamentals of Real Estate Investment
description:
The Fundamentals of Real Estate Investment Open Course from Saïd Business School, University of Oxford presents a modern and innovative approach to real estate investment and development. It is designed for both experienced professionals and newcomers, providing fresh perspectives grounded in theory, practical experience, and innovation to help support and make effective and impactful decisions. 
 It explores how global megatrends influence commercial and residential real estate, as well as the future of sustainable urban development. By understanding these trends, you’ll be better prepared to evaluate development and investment opportunities from multiple angles.  
 This course offers a foundational overview, introducing key concepts and frameworks for those new to the subject. To explore the topic in greater depth, you may wish to continue with  the full Oxford Real Estate Investment Programme.
